Dashboards

miraX provides interactive dashboards for visualization, monitoring, statistical analysis, and reporting of geospatial and time series data.

Available Dashboards

Single Time Series Dashboard (STD)

Interactive dashboard for analysing a single dataset or station.

Features include:

  • Metadata visualization
  • Raw data inspection
  • Statistical summaries
  • Extreme value analysis
  • CSV export
  • PDF report generation

Multiple Time Series Dashboard (MTD)

Compare multiple datasets, parameters, or stations within a single chart.

Features include:

  • Multi-series comparison
  • Shared temporal analysis
  • Combined visualization
  • Comparative statistics

Real-Time Dashboards

Dashboards can display near real-time environmental and hydrological observations from connected monitoring networks.

Capabilities include:

  • Live measurements
  • Continuous updates
  • Historical comparison
  • Downloadable datasets

Common Dashboard Features

  • Interactive charts
  • Statistical analysis
  • Extreme event analysis
  • Data export
  • Report generation
  • Multi-source integration
